title: Workhorse Group Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text:
Workhorse Group Second Quarter 2023 Results

Article Date: August 8, 2023

Key Highlights

Financial Performance: Net sales (after allowances): $4.0 million vs. $0.0 million year-over-year. Net loss: $23.0 million (compared to $21.2 million in Q2 2022). Cash position: $62.4 million as of June 30, 2023.

Operational Achievements

The company reported receiving 62 vehicle purchase orders and delivering 42 Class 4 vehicles during the quarter. CEO Rick Dauch stated the team was moving full speed ahead on our operational and strategic initiatives.

Product Development

W4 CC/W750: Ramped regular production at Union City facility. W56: Remains on schedule for September 2023 production launch. HorseFly drones: Signed first commercial purchase order and recorded initial sales. Aerospace division: Received $900,000 follow-up USDA grant.

2023 Revenue Guidance

Management revised expectations to project $65-85 million in annual revenue, citing HVIP voucher availability through GreenPower Motor Company and extended W56 certification testing delays.

Shareholder Meeting

Special stockholder meeting scheduled for August 28, 2023, to vote on increasing authorized shares of common stock.
